ALCHEMIST-AQUA_VITAE.title: Aqua Vitae
ALCHEMIST-AQUA_VITAE.description: Whenever you use a Potion, gain [blue]1[/blue] Max HP.
ALCHEMIST-AQUA_VITAE.flavor: The water of life distilled to its purest form.
ALCHEMIST-AURIC_SEAL.title: Auric Seal
ALCHEMIST-AURIC_SEAL.flavor: Stamped with the mark of perfection.
ALCHEMIST-CINNABAR_SHARD.title: Cinnabar Shard
ALCHEMIST-CINNABAR_SHARD.description: [gold]Poison[/gold] is triggered against enemies [blue]1[/blue] additional time.
ALCHEMIST-CINNABAR_SHARD.flavor: A fragment of crimson ore, still pulsing with toxicity.
ALCHEMIST-FLUX_STONE.title: Flux Stone
ALCHEMIST-FLUX_STONE.description: Whenever a card is created in combat, draw [blue]1[/blue] card.
ALCHEMIST-FLUX_STONE.flavor: Catalyzes reactions both alchemical and arcane.
ALCHEMIST-GILDED_KIT.title: Gilded Kit
ALCHEMIST-GILDED_KIT.description: You may [gold]Brew[/gold] at Rest Sites. Whenever you use a potion, heal [green]5[/green] HP. Potions can be sold to the Merchant for [gold]Gold[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-GILDED_KIT.flavor: An ornate case lined with gold leaf. Its contents rejuvenate body and spirit.
ALCHEMIST-EVERFLOWING_CHALICE.title: Everflowing Chalice
ALCHEMIST-EVERFLOWING_CHALICE.descriptio: At the start of each combat, procure a random potion. If your potion slots are full, gain {Energy:energyIcons()} instead.
ALCHEMIST-EVERFLOWING_CHALICE.flavor: However much you pour, it never quite runs dry.
ALCHEMIST-MIDAS_FRUIT.title: Midas Fruit
ALCHEMIST-MIDAS_FRUIT.description: Whenever you gain [gold]Gold[/gold], heal [green]1[/green] HP for every [blue]15[/blue] [gold]Gold[/gold] gained.
ALCHEMIST-MIDAS_FRUIT.flavor: Everything it touches turns to gold — and gold, in turn, to vitality.
ALCHEMIST-WEATHERED_KIT.title: Weathered Kit
ALCHEMIST-WEATHERED_KIT.description: You may [gold]Brew[/gold] at Rest Sites. Potions can be sold to the Merchant for [gold]Gold[/gold].
ALCHEMIST-WEATHERED_KIT.flavor: A battered case stained with years of use. It still carries the faintest warmth.
ALCHEMIST-SNAKE_TAIL.title: Snake Tail
ALCHEMIST-SNAKE_TAIL.description: The first time [gold]Poison[/gold] would reduce your HP to 0, heal to [green]33%[/green] of your Max HP instead (works once).
ALCHEMIST-SNAKE_TAIL.flavor: Shed like a serpent's tail — the bite is survived, the venom sloughed away.
